{Coins: 25, Red: 1, Chuck: 1, Unlimited Lives: 90, Unlimited Red: 15, Unlimited Chuck: 15}
Streak Multipliers (first-try win streak → token earn multiplier)

GREEDY model: buy each set's reward item (item 3) first + the cheapest fillers needed to unlock the set (col E thresholds). AX = cumulative tokens to COMPLETE the set. _ms = # sets (reward milestones) completed; _reward sums those sets' bonuses. Last-day leftover tokens buy non-reward items (no extra reward).
Goals and Rewards (30 items × 10 milestone tiers)
simplified: items bought sequentially in item-id order (choice ignored)
Score Per Win Streak Step (loss resets to step 1)
Leaderboard Rewards (top 60 positions; only top 25 carry rewards)
Player Rank Simulation (measured rank percentile → ladder reward) - SIMULATED
p25 = top-quartile finisher (lower position = better); source: data_event_inst position percentiles, measured on the CURRENT calendar
⚠ leaderboard track only - milestone ladder NOT simulated (all milestone reward cells are 0 in TaD/TaD_v2 config; deliberate scope cut)
⚠ LB size 50 per config; measured avg_bots ≈ 0–1; positions 11–20 configured but pay nothing
Player Rank Simulation (measured rank percentile → ladder reward) - SIMULATED
p25 = top-quartile finisher (lower position = better); source: data_event_inst position percentiles, measured on the CURRENT calendar
⚠ Level Race: observed positions exceed configured LBSize=10 (p75 up to 15) - live board size understated; ranks 11+ shown as below ladder
⚠ Flash Race: telemetry shows ≈0 of the 11 tracked resources (event pays SPT) - ladder HC here is config-nominal, uncorroborated
⚠ all five ladders are identical (family template) - authenticity vs live config unverified
Player Rank Simulation (measured rank percentile → ladder reward) - SIMULATED
p25 = top-quartile finisher (lower position = better); source: data_event_inst position percentiles, measured on the CURRENT calendar
⚠ winner-take-all: only position 1 pays (20 SPT + 4 boosters); SPT is outside the 11-resource universe
⚠ the 1h Unlimited Lives on opt-in is a JOIN grant, not a rank reward - not shown here (see flock-flurry.md)
